properties.name: Nate Signature Stays
properties.about_this_space:
Our property offers one of the best in its class, not only at a price point that maximizes value but also in terms of location, design and amenities. Strategically located in one of the few upscale neighborhood behind Wellspring university on Ihriri, you are assured of a safe, private, comfortable yet enjoyable stay when you book with us.

Our home is a four (4) bedroom duplex with 4.5 baths. All 4 bedrooms are ensuite with private bathrooms. Rooms also come standard with Smart TVs, Bose soundbar 700 and bass module 700 premium sound systems, Yamaha TSR receiver 5.1.2 capable systems. They also come with Amazon Alexa voice control devices for voice automation, wifi smoke detectors, smart switches, wardrobes, artistic wall arts and the best cozy feeling you've ever experienced.

Regarding other spaces, our home comes with a Sport's lounge with a snooker board, smart tv and Yamaha RX V481 5.1 channel receiver. Our living room comes equipped with a 85 inch smart tv paired with dolby atmos enabled Bose Soundbar 900. Our kitchen comes standard with all appliances and we have an in house LG washer/dryer. Home is also backed with a 12kva SRNE hybrid inverter, 32KWH batteries and a generator. We also have a cinema room which comes standard with the latest UST (Ultra Short Throw) projector from Hisense. Finally our home comes with a private game room with a wall mounted Sony Playstation 5 with two (2) controllers.

booking.whatsapp_prefill: Hello Umunna Stays, I'm interested in Nate Signature Stays in Benin City for [dates].

properties.name: Elkridge Apartments
properties.about_this_space: Step into this charming 3-bedroom getaway, where comfort meets style. Ideal for families, friends, or business travelers, this home boasts a bright and airy living space, a fully stocked kitchen, and cozy bedrooms for restful nights. Enjoy some fun downtime with the PS5 gaming console or relax in the outdoor space. Conveniently located near attractions, restaurants, and shops, this home offers modern amenities, free Wi-Fi, and thoughtful touches throughout.

properties.name: Hamaboi Presidential
properties.about_this_space: Step into elegance at the Presidential Apartment. This expansive 3-bedroom apartment is designed for guests who appreciate space, comfort, and refined living. Perfect for families, executives, or long stays, the Presidential offers beautifully furnished rooms, a spacious living area, and a serene ambiance that feels like home—only better. Whether you’re visiting for business or leisure, this apartment delivers a truly presidential experience in the heart of Asaba.
